# Post-Execution Assessment — `260101-observability-demo`

> Verdict: **PASS** ✅

## Summary

All planned tasks are complete and independently re-verified. The read-only
dashboard serves every panel from synthetic `/api/*` data with the KB tree
byte-identical after serving.

## Independent verification

| Check | Result |
|-------|--------|
| Index integrity | ✅ PASSED |
| Backend suites | ✅ green |
